title: TUI Forms form schema
description: Validates a JSONSchema document that tui-forms can parse into an interactive terminal form wizard.

$schema.description: URI of the meta-schema this document conforms to.

title.description: Form title shown to the user at the start of the wizard.

description.description: Optional description shown below the title.

type.description: Root type. Always 'object' for a tui-forms schema.

required.description: Keys that are expected to be present. Informational only; not enforced by tui-forms.

properties.description: The form questions. Each key becomes a question key in the returned answers dict.

$defs.description: Reusable schema fragments that can be referenced with $ref.

definitions.description: Alias for $defs, supported for compatibility. Reusable schema fragments.

patternProperties.description: Pattern-based property schemas. Recognised by tui-forms but not actively parsed.

allOf.description: Top-level conditional blocks that add questions based on previous answers.

property.description: A single form field definition. The question class is determined by 'format' first, then 'type' and the presence of options.

$ref.description: JSON Pointer to a definition in $defs or definitions (e.g. '#/$defs/MyDef'). Inline keys override the referenced schema.

type.description: JSONSchema type. Defaults to 'string' when omitted. Determines the question class together with 'format' and the presence of options.

format.description: Controls question class and input validation. 'computed' and 'constant' mark the field as hidden. Other values enable format-specific validators.

anyOf.description: 'computed': evaluates 'default' as a Jinja2 template after all user questions. 'constant': returns 'default' as-is without template rendering.
Enables built-in input validation. The renderer re-prompts on invalid input.
Any other format value is accepted without validation.

title.description: Label shown to the user as the question prompt. Defaults to the property key when omitted.

description.description: Help text shown below the question title.

default.description: Default value. Pre-filled for user-facing questions; used as the result for hidden fields. May be a Jinja2 template string when 'format' is 'computed'.

oneOf.description: Options for a single-choice question. Each entry must have 'const' and 'title'. Produces a QuestionChoice.

anyOf.description: Options for a single-choice question using anyOf style. Each entry must have 'enum' and 'title'. Produces a QuestionChoice.

items.description: Schema for array items. Use 'oneOf' or 'anyOf' on items to produce a multiple-choice question (QuestionMultiple).

oneOf.description: Tuple validation: fixed-length array with per-position schemas. Accepted by tui-forms but not actively parsed for question options.

properties.description: Sub-questions for 'type: object' fields. The object itself is not asked; its properties are unpacked as individual questions.

allOf.description: Conditional sub-question blocks for 'type: object' fields.

required.description: Required sub-keys. Informational only; not enforced by tui-forms.

minItems.description: Minimum number of array items. Documented but not enforced by tui-forms.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of array items. Documented but not enforced by tui-forms.

uniqueItems.description: Whether array items must be unique. Documented but not enforced by tui-forms.

minLength.description: Minimum string length. Documented but not enforced by tui-forms.

maxLength.description: Maximum string length. Documented but not enforced by tui-forms.

pattern.description: Regex pattern for string validation. Documented but not enforced by tui-forms.

validator.description: Dotted Python import path of a custom validator callable (e.g. 'mypackage.validators.is_valid'). The callable must accept a str and return bool. When present, overrides any format-based built-in validator. Ignored for hidden fields (format: constant or computed). An empty string is treated as no validator.

refTarget.description: A reusable schema fragment stored in $defs or definitions. May define option lists, property groups, or full property schemas.

enum.description: List of allowed values. Used in anyOf option-extraction patterns.

const.description: A fixed value. Used in oneOf option-extraction patterns.

option.description: A single choice option in a oneOf list.

const.description: The value stored in the answers dict when this option is selected.

title.description: The label displayed to the user.

anyOfOption.description: An option group in an anyOf list. Each value in 'enum' becomes a selectable option.

type.description: Optional JSONSchema type annotation for the enum values.

enum.description: One or more values for this option group.

title.description: The label displayed to the user for all values in this group.

itemsSchema.description: Schema for array items. Add oneOf or anyOf to produce a multiple-choice question.

$ref.description: Reference to a definition in $defs or definitions.

anyOf.description: Options for a multiple-choice question using anyOf style.

allOfArray.description: A list of conditional blocks. Each block shows additional questions when its 'if' condition is satisfied.

conditionalBlock.description: An allOf entry. When it contains 'if' and 'then', tui-forms uses it as a conditional block that adds questions when the 'if' condition matches the current answers. Items without 'if'/'then' are valid JSON Schema constraints and are silently skipped by tui-forms.

if.description: The condition. Must follow the pattern: {properties: {questionKey: {const: triggerValue}}}.

properties.description: Map of question keys to their expected trigger values.

const.description: The answer value that activates this conditional block.

then.description: Questions to add when the condition is satisfied. Either a $ref or an object with 'properties'.

oneOf.description: A direct $ref to a definition that contains the conditional properties.
An inline set of conditional questions, with an optional 'required' list.

required.description: Required keys within the conditional block. Informational only.
Standard JSON Schema 'required' constraint. Accepted but not enforced by tui-forms.
